markdown:
#  Add a Change Order for an Estimate 
##  Background 
If you need to add a change order for an estimate, you can create a change order within the Estimating tab. After the change order has been approved, you can choose to have it shown on the bid sheet. In addition, you can send it to the project's Change Events tool.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/bid-board-company/permissions) for the **Bid Board** tool.
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/estimating-project/permissions) for the **Estimating** tool.
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-planning-company/permissions) for the **Portfolio Planning** tool.
  * You can automatically add a change order to the project's Change Events tool by clicking **Send CO to Change Events** from the **Actions** menu.
  * Change orders can be shown on the bid.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Bid Board** or **Portfolio Planning** tool and select the **project**.  
OR  
Navigate to the project's **Estimating** tool.
  2. Click the **Estimating** tab.
  3. Click the estimate selection menu.  

![Estimate Selection Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2a01a716f966b487b0d3d48145af3e2c/5081994b0555d96f62d8cb26890d5712/estimate-selection-menu.png?fm=webp)
  4. In the Change Orders section, click the **plus** ![Icon Plus 2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b8c35346ced1ec96e52e19077ef035b/3034a031218bc5a48a7fa5509408f248/icon-plus-2.png?fm=webp&h=19) icon.  
This automatically adds a change order to the estimate.
  5. Adjust line items for the change order as necessary.
  6. To approve the change order, click the **vertical ellipsis**![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon on the change order tab, and select **Approved**.  
_Note:_ You can also rename or copy the change order from this menu if needed.  

![Clipboard E52694cefeac1bf768c8702cea7f7601e](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/72d41f05a7c110ceb5554b666295bdc4/6940f16167df96a0e871e6736af1202e/clipboard_e52694cefeac1bf768c8702cea7f7601e.png?fm=webp)


##  Next Steps 
  * To send the change order to the Change Events tool in Procore, see [Send Change Orders to the Change Events Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/estimating-project/tutorials/send-a-change-order-to-the-change-events-tool).
  * To show the change order on the bid proposal, see [Generate a Bid Proposal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/bid-board-company/tutorials/submit-a-bid-proposal).


## See Also
  * [Generate a Proposal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/estimating-project/tutorials/generate-bid-estimates)
  * [Merge Estimates](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/estimating-project/tutorials/merge-estimates)
  * [Edit an Estimate](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/estimating-project/tutorials/edit-an-estimate)
title: Add a Change Order for an Estimate
description: How to add a change order for an estimate in Procore's Estimating, Bid Board, or Portfolio Planning tools.
